name: harness
description: Iterative build with evaluator feedback loop (Anthropic harness pattern)

roles.description: Expands the scenario into a detailed product spec with features, acceptance criteria, and technical constraints. Defines what 'done' looks like for each feature.
Implements features from the spec one at a time. After each evaluator review, either refines the current approach or pivots to a different strategy. Writes code, tests, and documentation.

Grades each implementation sprint against criteria: feature completeness, design quality, code craft, and functionality. Runs the application, tests it, files bugs. Creates fix tasks for the generator if thresholds aren't met.

tasks.title: Expand scenario into detailed product spec with features and acceptance criteria
Implement all features from the spec, with tests
Grade implementation against spec criteria, run app, file bugs, create fix tasks if needed
